sub_instructions.description: Go to the end of the block and turn left
Move forward passing a bus stop and the UN building for Namibia on the right
Cross the street
Turn left at the next light
Stop in front of Sniffen Court Historic District on the left

12201.full_instructions: Go to the end of the block and turn left. Pass a bus stop and the UN building for Namibia on the right before crossing the street. Turn left at the next light. Stop in front of Sniffen Court Historic District on the left. If you reach a courtyard on either side of the street, you've gone too far.

sub_instructions.description: Go through the first intersection with Duane Reade on the corner
Turn left at the following set of lights with Rite Aid on the right
Go through the next set of lights
Pass Social Lounge on your left
Go to the intersection and stop at the lights

3538.full_instructions: Go through the first intersection with Duane Reade on the corner. At the following set of lights, with Rite Aid on the right, turn left. Go through the next set of lights. You will pass Social Lounge on your left. Go to the intersection and stop at the lights.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first light
Turn left at the second light
Pass CUNY on the left
Turn right at the next light
Go straight through one more light
Stop at Capital One Bank on the left

4801.full_instructions: Go straight through the first light and turn left at the second. Pass CUNY on the left before turning right at the next light. Go straight through one more light and stop at Capital One Bank on the left.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the light and TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD past the parking lot on the left and the park on the right
MOVE_FORWARD through the light
Stop in front of the bank just before the bend in the road on the left

11476.full_instructions: Head to the light and make a left. pass a parking lot on the left and a park on the right before going through the light. Stop in front of the bank just before the bend in the road on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the traffic light ahead.
Move forward passing Casa Mono on the left.
Go straight through the traffic light.
Turn right at the next traffic light.
Stop in front of TGI Fridays on the left, just before the traffic light.

5285.full_instructions: Turn left at the light ahead. Go straight through one light, passing Casa Mono on your left before it. Turn right at the next light. Go almost to the end of the block and stop in front of TGI Fridays on the left, just before the light.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the first light
TURN_RIGHT at the first light
MOVE_FORWARD PAST the next three lights
TURN_LEFT at the fourth light
MOVE_FORWARD PAST the very quick light
Stop just past the very quick light

4077.full_instructions: Head straight to the first light and make a right. You will then go through the next three lights and at the fourth light you will want to make a left. You will pass through a very quick light and just past the light you will want to stop.

sub_instructions.description: Go forward to the intersection and turn left
Go forward until reaching the traffic light
Turn right at the traffic light
Go forward through the next traffic light
Turn left at the following traffic light where Greenwich Lane and St Vincent's Triangle Park are on the corners
Stop before the next traffic light in front of Equinox

1624.full_instructions: Go forward to the intersection and turn left. Go forward until reaching the light. Take a right here and go through another light. At the following light, Greenwich Lane and St Vincent's Triangle Park are on the corners. Take a left following the street to the left of the park and stop before the next light in front of Equinox.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past the traffic light ahead
MOVE_FORWARD past the next intersection with Sushiden on the right
TURN_RIGHT at the traffic light with Roast Chicken on the far left corner and subway entrances
MOVE_FORWARD to the next traffic light with TGI Fridays on the far right corner and stop in the middle of the intersection

4130.full_instructions: Go past the light right in front of you. Go past the next intersection with Sushiden on your right. At the following light with Roast Chicken on your far left corner, and subway entrances, turn right. At the next light with TGI Fridays on your far right corner, stop in the middle of the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the intersection and make a left
Continue to the next intersection and make another left
Go through the next intersection
Continue about 2/3 of the way down the block past the CUNY School of Journalism and stop in front of Inakaya on your right

2350.full_instructions: Head to the intersection and make a left. Continue to the next intersection and make another left. Go through the next intersection. Continue about 2/3 of the way down the block past the CUNY School of Journalism and stop in front of Inakaya on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the traffic lights and turn right.
Turn right at the next set of lights where Duane Reade is on the corner.
Go straight through the next 2 sets of traffic lights.
Continue past Au Bon Pain located on the left corner.
Proceed to almost the end of the street and stop at Citibank on the left.

4117.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. At the next set of lights, with Duane Reade on the corner, turn right. Go through the next 2 sets of lights. Au Bon Pain will be on left corner. Go to almost the end of the street and stop at Citibank on the left.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past the overpasses
MOVE_FORWARD through the traffic light
TURN_RIGHT at the intersection
TURN_LEFT at the next intersection
TURN_RIGHT immediately
MOVE_FORWARD to the intersection by Hideaway Seaport

2897.full_instructions: Head straight past the overpasses and you will go through a light and the next intersection there will be an intersection on the right and make a right. Go up to the next intersection and make a left and a quick right. Head up the block and stop at the intersection by Hideaway Seaport.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the light with Gramercy Cafe on the left corner and turn right
Go straight to the 2nd light with Anisette Cafe Bistro on the far left corner and turn left
Continue down the long block and stop at the next light where Sushi Choshi is on the far left corner

6479.full_instructions: Head to the light with Gramercy Cafe on the left corner and turn right. Go straight to the 2nd light with Anisette Cafe Bistro on the far left corner and turn left. Continue down the long block and stop at the next light. Sushi Choshi should be on the far left corner.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the corner with Best Buy on the right
Turn right at the next light with Starbucks on the right corner
Continue to the next light with Duane Reade on the right corner and turn left
Go to the following light with Mad 46 and Charles Tyrwhitt on the right corners and turn right
Take one step forward and stop

12741.full_instructions: Turn left at the corner with Best Buy on the right. At the next light with Starbucks on the right corner, turn right. Continue to the next light with Duane Reade on the right corner, then turn left. Go to the following light with Mad 46 and Charles Tyrwhitt on the right corners, then turn right. Take one step forward and stop.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight
Turn right at Barlovento
Go through the next three intersections
Stop at Sunflower Diner before the intersection

3432.full_instructions: Go straight and take a right at Barlovento. Go through the next three intersections and continue on and stop at Sunflower Diner before the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the end of the block
Go straight to pass TD Bank on the left
Turn right in two more lights
Take a couple of steps and stop

11574.full_instructions: Turn left at the end of the block. Go straight to pass TD Bank on the left, then turn right in two more lights. Take a couple of steps and stop.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the light and TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD past the light with a left turn
MOVE_FORWARD through the next light
MOVE_FORWARD to the next intersection
TURN_LEFT at the intersection near NYU Dentistry
MOVE_FORWARD several steps past the turn and stop

5647.full_instructions: Walk to the light and turn right. Walk past the light with a left turn. Go through the next light. Walk down to the next intersection. Turn left - you might see NYU Dentistry on the left corner. Stop several steps past the left turn.

sub_instructions.description: Head to first immediate light and make a right.
Head down the long block to the corner with Duane Reade on the far left.
Turn left at the corner.
Head past the next light, passing a bike rental on the left.
Stop in front of the Jensen lewis building on the right.

7331.full_instructions: Head to first immediate light and make a right. Head down the long block and stop at the corner with Duane Reade on the far left. Turn left here. Head past the next light, having passed a bike rental on the left. Stop in front of the Jensen lewis building on right.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight towards the T-intersection
Turn right at the T-intersection
Go straight until the road ends
Turn right
Stay left at the fork
Go straight, passing under several bridges, until the first stoplight
Turn right at the stoplight
Stop just after passing Cowgirl Seahorse on the left

3074.full_instructions: Go straight and turn right at the T-intersection. Go straight until you can't anymore and turn right again, making sure to stay left at the fork. Keep going straight until you reach the first stoplight, which is very far. You will go under several bridges. Turn right at the light and stop just after Cowgirl Seahorse on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the 1st light
Go straight through the light immediately after
Pass straight through both of the next set of double lights
Go straight through the 1st light of the next set
Turn right at the 2nd light of the next set
Go straight through the next light
Stop at the car wash on the left

4755.full_instructions: Turn left at the 1st light and go straight through the light immediately after. Pass straight through both of the next set of double lights. You may see water on your left. At the next set of lights, go straight through the 1st and turn right at the 2nd. Go straight through the next light and stop at the car wash on left.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the Waverly Inn on the right and then the right side street
Turn right at the T-intersection with Starbucks on the left
Turn left at the lights with Roasting Plant on the right
Pass a park on the left
Go through the lights
Pass Duane Reade on the right
Stop just before Subway on the right corner

11197.full_instructions: Pass the Waverly Inn on the right and then the right side street and then turn right at the T-intersection with Starbucks on the left. At the lights with Roasting Plant on the right turn left. Pass a park on your left and go through the lights. Pass Duane Reade on the right and stop just before Subway on the right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Go through the intersection with Irving Farm and Dudleys on the corners
Go past Lower East Side Tenement Museum
Go straight through the double intersection
Pass Melt on the right while approaching the intersection
Turn left at the intersection
Pass Jadis
Go through the first set of lights in the double intersection and stop

5953.full_instructions: Go through the intersection with Irving Farm and Dudleys on the corners. Go past Lower East Side Tenement Museum and go straight through the double intersection. Go to the intersection, passing Melt on the right, and turn left. Pass Jadis and go through the first set of lights in the double intersection and stop.

sub_instructions.description: Move forward to the first intersection
Turn right at the first intersection
Move forward through the next three intersections
Stop just before the fourth intersection with Southern Hospitality on the right

1512.full_instructions: Begin heading down the street and take a right at the first intersection. Continue straight through the next three intersections, then end just before the fourth intersection, with Southern Hospitality on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Walk to the light and turn right.
Follow the road as it curves slightly past the grocery store and bike rental.
At the next light, turn right.
Keep going past the pizza place on the left to the next light at the T-intersection.
Stop in the intersection near the Deli.

3171.full_instructions: Walk to the light and turn right. Follow the road as it curves slightly past the grocery store and bike rental. At the next light, turn right. On the left you'll see a pizza place. Keep going to the next light, which will be T-intersection and have a Deli on the corner. Stop in the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight until the first light and make a right.
Head to the next light and make a left.
Pass by the park on your right.
Go through a set of double lights.
Stop just before the Theodore Roosevelt Birthplace Site on your left.

2653.full_instructions: Head straight until the first light and make a right. Head to the next light and make a left. You will pass by the park on your right. You will go through a set of double lights and stop just before the Theodore Roosevelt Birthplace Site on your left.

sub_instructions.description: Go through the first set of lights
Pass Subway on the left
Turn right at the next lights
Turn left at the next corner with Bank of America on the right
Pass Zara on the right corner
Stop between Zara and Don Peterson, before the bus stop

11247.full_instructions: Go through the first set of lights. Pass Subway on the left as you head to the next lights where you will turn right. At the next corner with Bank of America on the right turn left. Pass Zara on the right corner and stop between that and Don Peterson. It is before the bus stop.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight for a few blocks until you reach BP gas station on the left
Turn left after passing the BP gas station
Stop just after Quality Inn on the right, passing the church first

11844.full_instructions: Go straight for a few blocks until you reach BP gas station on the left. Turn left after passing it. Stop just after Quality Inn on the right, which is shortly after a church.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first traffic light
Turn left at the second traffic light
Move forward until you reach the next traffic light
Cross the intersection with the square and park on the left
Stop just before reaching the side street on the left that merges into the current road

4301.full_instructions: Begin going straight through 1 light and at the following light, turn left. Continue down the road until you reach a traffic light. A square and park should be on the left corner and beyond. Cross the intersection and stop a step before reaching the left side street that merges into the road you are on by that square area.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the parking lot and proceed to the corner
Turn right at the corner
Go through the traffic light
Go through the 4-way intersection
Reach the intersection with Dudleys and Irving Farm on the corners
Turn right at the intersection with Dudleys and Irving Farm
Stop a few steps before the next traffic light, next to Lower East Museum on the left

10556.full_instructions: Pass a parking lot to the corner and turn right. Go through a light and a 4-way intersection before reaching an intersection with Dudleys and Irving Farm on the corners. A double light intersection is one too far. Turn right and stop a few steps before the light, next to Lower East Museum on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right
Go to the second set of lights and turn left
Stop at the corner of the first building you arrive at

2627.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Go to the second set of lights and turn left. You will want to stop at the corner of the first building you arrive at. Santander will be on the left and Herald Square is on the right.

sub_instructions.description: turn left at the light directly in front
go straight through 3 traffic lights
stop just before the following light near Chipotle and Museum of Sex

2784.full_instructions: At the light directly in front turn left. Go straight through 3 traffic lights and stop just before the following light. There should be a Chipotle and Museum of Sex on the corners.

sub_instructions.description: Pass a theatre on the right to the corner where Hard Rock Cafe is on the left
Turn right
Go through 2 lights passing Chase on the 1st corner and Ruby Tuesday on the 2nd
Stop 1/2 to the next light, just before Wasabi on the left

6625.full_instructions: Pass a theatre on the right to the corner where Hard Rock Cafe is on the left. Turn right and go through 2 lights passing Chase on the 1st corner and Ruby Tuesday on the 2nd. Stop 1/2 to the next light, just before Wasabi on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight to the light and turn left.
Proceed to the next light and turn right.
Go all the way to the end of the block at the next light and stop in the middle of that intersection.

3769.full_instructions: Go straight to the light and turn left. Proceed to the next light and turn right. Go all the way to the end of the block at the next light and stop in the middle of that intersection. Trestle on Tenth should be on that near right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the end of the block with Fresh&Co on the corner and make a left.
Go past Pret A Manger and proceed through the traffic light.
Continue past Doctors without Borders on the left and go through the next traffic light.
Head towards the next traffic light and stop before reaching it.

6876.full_instructions: Head to the end of the block with Fresh&Co on the corner and make a left. Go past Pret A Manger an through the light. Doctors without Borders will be on your left before going through another light. Head almost all the way to the next light and then stop.

sub_instructions.description: Walk forward and turn left before reaching the traffic light.
Move forward through the first traffic light.
Move forward through the second traffic light, noting the Starbucks on the corner.
Move forward through the third traffic light.
Stop before the next traffic light, with The Counter and a bike rental on either side.

6448.full_instructions: Walk forward and before reaching the light, you will turn left on a street or sidewalk adjacent to the street. Go through 1 light and then another light with a Starbucks on the corner. Walk through yet another light and step before the next light. The Counter and a bike rental will be on either side of you.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight past the 1st light with the Lego store on the left corner
Go past the 2nd light with the park to your left
Turn left at the 3rd light with Charles Schwab on the far left corner
Turn right at the following light with Eleven Madison Park on the right corner
Take a step before stopping

11609.full_instructions: Head straight past the 1st light with the Lego store on the left corner. Go past the 2nd light with the park to your left. At the 3rd light with Charles Schwab on the far left corner, turn left. At the following light with Eleven Madison Park on the right corner, turn right. Take a step before stopping.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT
TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD past the playground on the left
TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD past the bus stop on the right
Stop at Chase on the right

6165.full_instructions: Make two left turns to head the opposite way on the other side of the block. Keep going to pass a playground on your left, then turn right. Pass a bus stop on your right and stop in front of Chase on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Walk to the light with Murry Hill Diner on the corner
Turn left at the light
Go through the first light
Go through the second light passing Brother Jimmy's BBQ on the left
Go through the third light passing a small church on the far right corner
Pass the Old Print Shop on the right side
Stop a few steps before the next light

12839.full_instructions: Walk to the light with Murry Hill Diner on the corner and turn left. Go through 3 lights, the 2nd has Brother Jimmy's BBQ on the left and 3rd has a small church on the far right corner. Pass that church and stop a few steps before the next light. You'll have just passed Old Print Shop on the right side.

sub_instructions.description: Walk past the park on the right to the end of the road
Turn left
Go past a high school to the end of the block with Chase on the corner
Turn right
Pass CVS and Duane Reade
Go through the traffic light
Stop 1/2 to the next light near Gabay's and Subway on the right

11790.full_instructions: Walk past the park on the right to the end of the road and turn left. Go past a high school to the end of the block with Chase on the corner. Turn right and pass CVS and Duane Reade before a light which you will go through. Stop 1/2 to the next light near Gabay's and Subway on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Head past the 1st light with Restoration Hardware on the right corner
Turn right at the 2nd light with subway entrances at the corners
Stop at the following light with Ethan Allen on the far right corner

6455.full_instructions: Head past the 1st light with Restoration Hardware on the right corner. At the 2nd light with subway entrances at the corners, turn right. Stop at the following light with Ethan Allen on the far right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right.
Continue through the next 2 sets of lights.
Stop before the next set of lights, near the middle of the last building on the right.

1993.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Continue through the next 2 sets of lights. You will want to stop before the next set of lights. It will be about the middle of the last building on your right. You may be able to see Big Daddy's Gramercy Park across the street.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight through the first light
Turn left at the second light
Go to the next light and make a right
Pass by the Marmara on the left
Stop right before the bike rental on your right

2478.full_instructions: Head straight through the first light and at the second light make a left. Go to the next light and make a right. Pass by the Marmara on the left and stop right before the bike rental on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through two traffic lights.
Pass Herald Square on your left.
Turn right at the next traffic light.
Stop in front of Hampton Inn on your left, located just after Hilton Garden Inn.

5002.full_instructions: Go straight through two lights. Pass Herald Square, a park, on your left before turning right at the next light. Stop in front of Hampton Inn on your left. It's right after Hilton Garden Inn.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first traffic light.
Turn right at the following traffic light, where a garden or square is on the near right corner.
Walk forward to the next traffic light.
Turn left at the traffic light.
Pass the 4-way intersection.
Stop just before entering the final traffic light, with a bus stop on the far left corner.

4742.full_instructions: Go straight through 1 light and at the following light very soon after the 1st, a garden or square should be on the near right corner. Turn right and walk to the next light. Turn left and pass a 4-way intersection and stop just before entering the traffic light. A bus stop should be on the far left corner.

sub_instructions.description: turn left at the intersection with banks on three corners
turn right at City National Bank on the left corner
stop in front of AKA Times Square hotel on the right, which is right after Belasco Theatre

10065.full_instructions: When you reach the intersection with banks on three corners, turn left. When you reach City National Bank on the left corner, turn right. Stop in front of AKA Times Square hotel on the right, which is right after Belasco Theatre. If you reach a small courtyard, you've gone too far.

sub_instructions.description: Take the first right turn.
Move forward passing the side street on the left.
Turn left at the traffic lights.
Move forward passing BP on the right corner.
Turn right at the traffic lights.
Stop at Enoch's Bike Shop on the right corner.

11263.full_instructions: Take your first right. Pass a left side street and continue to the lights and turn left. Pass BP on the right corner and then turn right at the lights. Take 2 steps and stop at Enoch's Bike Shop on the right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the end of the road with the park in front and turn right.
Turn left at the corner of the park.
Go past the width of the park and proceed through the traffic light.
Turn left at the traffic light where Starbucks and Flatiron Hotel are on the right corners.
Stop a few steps after turning, near Rizzoli and Num Pang on the right.

10697.full_instructions: Go to the end of the road with a park in front and turn right. When you reach the corner of the park, turn left. Go the width of the park and through the light. At the light with Starbucks and Flatiron Hotel on the right corners, turn left. Stop a few steps after turning, near Rizzoli and Num Pang on the right.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD passing through 1 light
TURN_RIGHT at the following intersection
MOVE_FORWARD through 1 light
MOVE_FORWARD to the middle of the following intersection

3764.full_instructions: Go straight passing through 1 light and at the following intersection, turn right. Proceed straight through 1 light and stop in the middle of the following intersection. A parking lot or garage should be on the left corner ahead of you. A synagogue is ahead to the right.

sub_instructions.description: Head down the block
Make a left at the first intersection
Go down a long block
Make a right at the light
Continue through the next light
Stop just before Nublu, with the secret garden on the left

4830.full_instructions: Head down the block and make a left at the first intersection. You will then go down a long block and make a right at the light. Continue through the next light and there will be a secret garden on the left and you will be just before Nublu.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD and TURN_RIGHT at Capital One
MOVE_FORWARD past 2 intersections
TURN_RIGHT at the 3rd intersection
Stop at Delis 48

4224.full_instructions: Go straight and take a right at Capital One. Go through the next 3 intersections and at the 3rd one take a right. Stop at Delis 48.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the light and turn left.
Go past the next 3 lights with Skyline Hotel on the left corner.
Stop at the 4th light with As is NYC on the right corner.

6415.full_instructions: Head to the light and turn left. Go past the next 3 lights with Skyline Hotel on the left corner. Stop at the 4th light with As is NYC on the right corner.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD PAST Columbus Park
TURN_LEFT AT T-intersection
MOVE_FORWARD TO first set of lights in the double intersection
TURN_LEFT AT first set of lights
Stop at 10 Below Ice Cream

2329.full_instructions: Go forward past Columbus Park and turn left at the T-intersection. Go to the first set of lights in the double intersection and turn left. 10 Below Ice Cream is on the left corner. Stop here.

sub_instructions.description: Head up the block passing Domino's on the corner and proceed through the traffic light
Go through the next traffic light passing Pizza 33 on the corner
Turn right at the following traffic light
Move forward passing 99$ pizza on the left
Go past the next traffic light and stop in front of the wax center

11868.full_instructions: Head up the block, passing Domino's on the corner before proceeding through the light. Go through another light and Pizza 33 will be on the corner. At the following light make a right and pass 99$ pizza on the left. Go just past the next light and then stop in front of the wax center.

sub_instructions.description: Turn right at the light immediately in front of you
Turn left at the next light with Chipotle on the near left corner
Go past the next 2 lights with bike rentals on the right
Stop in the intersection at the 3rd light with Cafe au bon gout

6220.full_instructions: Turn right at the light immediately in front of you. Go to the next light with Chipotle on the near left corner and turn left. Go past the next 2 lights with bike rentals on the right. At the 3rd light with Cafe au bon gout, stop in the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Go past Simply Hooked to the traffic light
Turn right at the traffic light
Walk by a small garden on the right
Walk through the intersection
Turn left at the next traffic light with a school on the far corner
Stop about 1/3 of the way down the block next to Nebulous Gaming on the left

12181.full_instructions: Go past Simply Hooked to the light and turn right. Walk by a small garden on the right and through the following intersection. At the next light with a school on the far corner, turn left. Stop about 1/3 of the way down the block next to Nebulous Gaming on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first light
Turn left at the second light
Go to the next light and turn right at New York Doctors
Go through the next light
Stop before reaching the second light in front of Murray Hill Market on the right

5439.full_instructions: Go straight through the first light and turn left at the second light. GNC Live Well should be in the far left corner. Go to the next light and turn right at New York Doctors. Go through the next light and stop before reaching the second light in front of Murray Hill Market on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go through the traffic light with Pizza 33
Pass McDonald's and 7-Eleven on the right
Go through the traffic light after McDonald's and 7-Eleven
Turn right at the next traffic light with Moonstruck and Dough Boys
Pass a bike rental
Stop a few steps before the next traffic light near Brother Jimmy's BBQ

10773.full_instructions: Go through a light with Pizza 33 and pass McDonald's and 7-Eleven on the right and through the light after them. At the next light with Moonstruck and Dough Boys, turn right. Pass a bike rental and stop a few steps before the next light. You should be near Brother Jimmy's BBQ on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Head through the first light
Turn right at the second light
Go all the way down the block
Turn left at the next light
Continue through another light
Stop just before the light with a Duane Reade on your right

4606.full_instructions: Head through the first light and at the second light you will make a right. Go all the way down the block and at the next light make a left. Continue through another light and you will stop just before the light with a Duane Reade on your right.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD until merging onto the main road
MOVE_FORWARD along the road passing Buy Rite Pharmacy and a mailbox on the right
MOVE_FORWARD past 1 light
TURN_RIGHT at the following light
MOVE_FORWARD and stop before the left side street with a church on the far left corner

6199.full_instructions: Go straight until merging onto the main road and follow that road where you should be passing Buy Rite Pharmacy and a mailbox on the right. Pass 1 light and at the following, you should take a sharp right turn. Go forward and stop a step before a left side street where a church is on the far left corner.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT at the first light, noting Citibank on the near right corner
MOVE_FORWARD straight through two lights, passing Starbucks on the right
MOVE_FORWARD to stop at the second building on the right, just after Roast Chicken

5261.full_instructions: Turn left at the first light, with Citibank on your near right corner. Go straight through two lights, passing Starbucks on the right between them. Stop at the second building on the right, just after Roast Chicken. It's probably only a few steps after the light.

sub_instructions.description: Go through 1 traffic light.
At the following light, where The GEM Hotel and Chelsea Florist are on the corners, turn right.
Go to the next light and stop in the middle of the intersection, keeping Vibe on the left corner and Walgreens ahead to the right.

4240.full_instructions: Begin going through 1 traffic light and at the following light, The GEM Hotel and Chelsea Florist should be on the corners. Turn right here and go the next light and stop in the middle of the intersection. Vibe is on the left corner and a Walgreens is ahead to the right.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the T-intersection
Go through the lights
At the following lights cross over to the right
Go past 10 Below Ice Cream on the right
Pass a left side street
Pass the church immediately after the left side street
Pass a right side street
Go to the end of the block
Turn right at the lights
Stop

11453.full_instructions: Turn left at the T-intersection and go through the lights. At the following lights cross over to the right so you go past 10 Below Ice Cream on the right. Pass a left side street with a church right after it. Pass a right side street and go to the end of the block and turn right at the lights. Take a step and stop.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight to the first intersection and make a right.
Go straight to the next intersection and make a left.
Go straight through the intersection and stop a few buildings after, across from Pure Thai Cookhouse on the right and before Island Burger and Shakes.

2248.full_instructions: Go straight to first intersection and make a right. Go straight to first intersection and make a left. Go straight through first intersection and stop a few buildings after - across from Pure Thai Cookhouse on right and before Island Burger and Shakes.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight to first light and make a left.
Continue to next intersection and make a right.
Head up to the light with a Subway on your left and turn left.
Continue to next light and turn left.
Stop in front of the bus stop on your right, and Rustic table on left.

3201.full_instructions: Head straight to first light and make a left. Continue to next intersection and make a right. Head up to the light with a Subway on your left and turn left. Continue to next light and turn left. Stop in front of the bus stop on your right, and Rustic table on left.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the light with the pond park on the far left.
Move forward past the park to the next light.
Move forward through the intersection where the large building is on the right corner.
Turn right immediately after passing the large building.
Move forward to the end of the street.
Turn left.
Turn right.
Move forward to the end of the block and stop.

9974.full_instructions: Start at the light with a pond park on the far left and turn left. Pass the park and at the next light, a large building is on the right corner. Pass through and turn right as soon as you can on the other side of that large building. Go to the end of the street then make a quick left and right. Stop at the end of the block.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the traffic light and turn left.
Move forward through one traffic light.
Turn right at the second traffic light.
Stop in front of the CVS on the right.

3961.full_instructions: Go to the traffic light and turn left. Move through one light and at the second light, turn right stopping a few paces after turning in front of the CVS on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the third set of lights with Bank of America on the corner and turn left
Pass Boiler Bar on the right and Manhattan School for Career Development on the left
Stop when you reach the last building on the left, just after La Sultana on the right

7364.full_instructions: Go to the third set of lights with Bank of America on the corner and turn left. Pass Boiler Bar on the right and Manhattan School for Career Development on the left. You will stop when you reach the last building on the left, it will be just after La Sultana on the right.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the traffic light with TD Bank on the left corner, then TURN_LEFT
MOVE_FORWARD to the next traffic light with Citibank on the left corner, then TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD to the following traffic light with Hong Kong Supermarket on the far right corner
MOVE_FORWARD to cross the street and stop

10347.full_instructions: Head to the light with TD Bank on the left corner, then turn left. At the next light with Citibank on the left corner, turn right. Head to the following light with Hong Kong Supermarket on the far right corner. Cross the street, then stop there.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past the park
MOVE_FORWARD through the traffic light
MOVE_FORWARD through the next traffic light
MOVE_FORWARD through the double light intersection with the TD Bank on the far left corner
TURN_LEFT at the following traffic light
Stop 3/4 down the block next to Roasting Plant and Mooshoes

11793.full_instructions: Walk past a park through the light and then the light after it. The next intersection is a double light one with a TD Bank on the far left corner. Go through it and turn left at the following light. Stop 3/4 down the block next to Roasting Plant and Mooshoes. An Choi and Sticky Rice are too far.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the first intersection and make a right
Go past the next intersection
Pass the small park on the left
Go past one more intersection
Make a left at the T-intersection
Continue past the next light
Stop in front of A-1 Pizza on the right

7182.full_instructions: Head to the first intersection and make a right. Go past the next intersection and then a small park will be on your left. Go past one more intersection and make a left at the T-intersection. Continue past the next light and stop in front of A-1 Pizza on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first intersection and continue until the road merges to the left
Continue straight until the light where Restaurante Waverly and a mail drop box are located
Turn right at the light
Go straight through 2 lights
Stop just before the following light, near the play area on the left

2304.full_instructions: Go straight through the first intersection and continue until the road merges to the left. Continue straight until the light where there is Restaurante Waverly and a mail drop box on the corners. Turn right and go straight through 2 lights. Go and stop just before the following light, near the corner of play area on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight down the long block to the light with Food Emporium on the far left corner
Turn right at the light
Continue to the next light and stop where the fire station is on the far left corner

5698.full_instructions: Head straight down the long block to the light with Food Emporium on the far left corner. Turn right here. Continue to the next light and stop. The fire station should be on the far left corner.

sub_instructions.description: Head down the block to the next light with Chase on the left corner and turn left
Go past the 1st light
Turn right at the 2nd light with HSBC on the right corner
At the next light, which is a T-intersection, cross the street and stop with Great NY Noodletown on the right

4816.full_instructions: Head down the block to the next light with Chase on your left corner and turn left. Go past the 1st light. At the 2nd light with HSBC on your right corner, turn right. At the next light, which is a T-intersection, cross the street and stop. Great NY Noodletown should be on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn right
Go through the next 2 sets of lights
Turn right at the 3rd set of lights, with Eisenberg Sandwich on the corner
Take a few steps and stop just after Sagaponack on the left

4291.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn right. Go through the next 2 sets of lights. At the 3rd set, with Eisenberg Sandwich on the corner, turn right. Take a few steps and stop just after Sagaponack on the left.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the bike rental
Turn left at the lights
Turn right at the following lights
Pass a left side street and proceed with the park on both sides
Turn left at the next corner
Pass the playground on the left and stop just over half way down the block

11046.full_instructions: Pass the bike rental and turn left and the lights. Turn right at the following lights. Pass a left side street and then a park will be on both sides of you. Turn left at the next corner. Pass the playground on the left and stop just over half way down the block.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT sharp.
MOVE_FORWARD through the light.
MOVE_FORWARD under the overpasses.
TURN_RIGHT at the light.
TURN_RIGHT.
MOVE_FORWARD past the Cupcake Cafe.
TURN_RIGHT.
MOVE_FORWARD a few steps and stop.

12751.full_instructions: Take a sharp left. if you end up on a road going the direction you came from, go back and choose the one just to the right. Go through the light and under a number of overpasses before reaching another light. Turn right. Take two more rights and stop a few steps after the second. Cupcake Cafe is before the last right.

sub_instructions.description: Pass the bus stop on your left
Turn left
Pass the playground on your left and the tiny garden on your right
Cross the street
Stop after exiting the intersection with the 7-Eleven on your right

10426.full_instructions: Turn left after you pass a bus stop on your left. Pass a playground on your left and a tiny garden on your right, then cross the street. Stop after exiting the intersection. There will be a 7-Eleven on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the traffic light and turn right.
Go through the next traffic light, noting Enoch's bike shop on the far corner.
Pass a gas station on the left.
Turn right at the traffic light.
Turn left at the first available side street.
Stop mid-block with the park on the right.

10789.full_instructions: Go to the light and turn right. Go through the following light with Enoch's bike shop on the far corner. Pass a gas station on the left, and when you come to the light, turn right. Take the first available left side street. There will be a park on the right, stop mid block.

sub_instructions.description: Walk to the 1st light and make a left turn.
Go past the next 2 lights with Calvary Church on the far right corner.
Stop one step before the next light.

11070.full_instructions: Walk to the 1st light and make a left turn. Go past the next 2 lights with Calvary Church on the far right corner. Stop one step before the next light. Morton Williams Supermarket should be on your left.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past the light with Capital One at the left corner
TURN_RIGHT at the following light
MOVE_FORWARD to the next light with Pottery Barn on your right corner and Loehmann's on your left corner and stop in the middle of the intersection

5086.full_instructions: Go past the light with Capital One at the left corner. At the following light, turn right. Continue to the next light with Pottery Barn on your right corner and Loehmann's on your left corner and stop in the middle of the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the third set of lights and turn right
Look for Big Daddy's on the left hand side at the corner to confirm the turn
Go to the next set of lights and stop at the lights
Verify Fraiche Maxx is visible across the intersection

1994.full_instructions: Go to the third set of lights and turn right. Big Daddy's will be on the left hand side at the corner. The last 2 sets of lights are very close together so look for Big Daddy's. Go to the next set of lights and stop at the lights. You should see Fraiche Maxx across the intersection.

sub_instructions.description: Walk to the light and turn left.
Go through the entire intersection and walk to the next light which has Chase on the near right corner.
Turn right.
Go all the way to the next light passing a bike rental on the left.
Stop on the other side of the intersection, next to where the 1st building on the block begins.

4688.full_instructions: Walk to the light and turn left. Go through the entire intersection and walk to the next light which has Chase on the near right corner. Turn right and go all the way to the next light passing a bike rental on the left. Stop on the other side of the intersection, next to where the 1st building on the block begins.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD past three intersections
TURN_RIGHT at Le Coucou
MOVE_FORWARD
TURN_LEFT at Starbucks
Stop at HSBC

3450.full_instructions: Go straight through the next three intersections and at the fourth one where Le Coucou is take a right. Continue on and take a left at the next intersection where Starbucks is then stop at HSBC.

sub_instructions.description: Turn right immediately
Turn left after The Meatball Shop on the right
Turn right after passing Stanton Social on the right
Stop in the center of the next intersection near Wolfnights

5564.full_instructions: Turn right immediately. Turn left after The Meatball Shop on the right. Turn right after you pass Stanton Social on the right. Then stop in the center of the next intersection. Wolfnights the gourmet wrap will be on your upper right corner.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the first light and turn left
At the next light, turn right
Go past an immediate light
Head down to the next light with a park on the right and Maialino on the left
Stop at this light

4517.full_instructions: Go to the first light and make a left and at the next light you will make a right. Go past an immediate light and head down to the next light with a park on your right and Maialino on your left. You will stop right at this light.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through the first two lights.
Turn right at the intersecting street with Joe on the corner.
Go straight, veering slightly left, until the road Ts.
Stop at the intersection where Whynot is on the corner.

2553.full_instructions: Go straight through the first two lights. Halfway down the next block a street will intersect on the right - turn right here with Joe on the corner. Go straight - veering to the left a bit - until the road Ts. Stop here in the intersection. Whynot is on the corner.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_LEFT at the Starbucks on the corner
MOVE_FORWARD through the light with Chase on the corner
MOVE_FORWARD through the light with a church nearby to the far left
TURN_RIGHT at the next light past the church
Stop next to Glasnost Precious Metals or a pharmacy

10660.full_instructions: Go to the Starbucks on the corner and turn left. Go through 1 light with Chase on the corner and another light with a church nearby to the far left. Pass that church to the next light and turn right. Stop a few steps after turning, possibly next to Glasnost Precious Metals or a pharmacy.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight to the traffic light and turn right.
Go straight to the first intersection and turn left.
Go straight through the first traffic light.
Go straight towards the second traffic light, passing Li-Lac Chocolates on the left.
Turn right at the second traffic light.
Go forward two steps.

4049.full_instructions: Go straight to the light and turn right. Go straight to the first intersection and turn left. Go straight through the first traffic light and a second light will be almost immediately after - you'll pass Li-Lac Chocolates on your left. Turn right and go forward two steps.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through both lights at the double intersection
Turn right at the following light, where Charles Schwab is on the right corner
Stop at New York Edition on the right, almost reaching the next light

12783.full_instructions: Go straight through both lights at the double intersection. At the following light there should be a Charles Schwab on the right corner, turn right. Stop in the middle of New York Edition on the right. Almost to the light.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the corner and make a left at the light
Pass a small garden on the left
Make a right at the first light
Continue through a quick light
Make a left at the next intersection
Stop when the road starts to bend

7018.full_instructions: Head to the corner and make a left at the light. Yo will pass a small garden on the left and make a right at the first light. Continue through a quick light and at the next intersection make a left. Stop when the road starts to bend.

sub_instructions.description: Go to the lights and turn left
Go through the next three sets of lights
Turn left at the fourth set of lights
Stop at the end of the Wrapido building

4788.full_instructions: Go to the lights and turn left. Go through the next three sets of lights. At the fourth set you will turn left. Wrapido is the first building on the left. Stop at the end of this building. Maruko Sushi & Tea will be across the street.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight through 2 traffic lights
Turn right at the intersection with the glasses store and 12 Corners cafe
Go straight through 1 traffic light
Stop less than halfway to the next light

2223.full_instructions: Go straight through 2 traffic lights and at the following intersection, there should be a glasses store and 12 Corners cafe on the corners. Turn right and go straight through 1 traffic light. Stop less than 1/2 to the next light. If you reach a large school building on the right you've gone too far.

sub_instructions.description: Head straight to the light with Subway at the left corner
Make a right turn
Go through the next 2 lights with Jensen-Lewis on the far right corner
Go exactly 1/2 block
Stop right in between the 1st and 2nd building on your left

11604.full_instructions: Head straight to the light with Subway at the left corner, then make a right turn. Go through the next 2 lights with Jensen-Lewis on the far right corner. Go exactly 1/2 block and stop right in between the 1st and 2nd building on your left.

sub_instructions.description: Turn left at the traffic light immediately in front of you.
Turn right at the next traffic light where the GNC Live Well store is on the opposite corner.
Turn left at the next traffic light where the Starbucks is on the left corner.
Take one step after the turn and stop.

3070.full_instructions: Turn left at the light immediately in front of you. At the next light, with the GNC Live Well store on the opposite corner, turn right. Keep going to the next light, with the Starbucks on the left corner, and turn left. Take one step after your turn and stop.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the light and make a left
Go up through the light passing GNC on the left
Go to the next light with Pizza 33 on the right and make a left there
Head more than half way up, and stop just past Prestige Car Rental on the left and La Tarte on the right

11074.full_instructions: Head to the light and make a left. Go up through the light passing GNC on the left. Go to the next light with Pizza 33 on the right and make a left there. Head more than half way up, and stop just past Prestige Car Rental on the left and La Tarte on the right.

sub_instructions.description: Walk ahead to the light
Turn right
Turn left immediately after
Go through a light with Nice Guy's on the far corner
At the next light with a square ahead to the right, take the right path
Follow the path as it curves and go to the light on the opposite corner of the square
Turn left
Take a step and stop between 2 squares

12866.full_instructions: Walk ahead to the light, turn right then turn left immediately after. Go through a light with Nice Guy's on the far corner and at the next light with a square ahead to the right, take the right path. Follow it as it curves and go to the light on the opposite corner of the square. Turn left, take a step and stop between 2 squares.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD to the light and TURN_RIGHT
MOVE_FORWARD past the parking area on the left
TURN_LEFT at the light
MOVE_FORWARD through the following light, passing NY Sports Club on the far corner
STOP at the intersection of the next light, just past Starbucks on the left corner

10474.full_instructions: Go to the light and turn right. You'll pass a parking area on the left, and when you get to the light, turn left. Go through the following light, NY Sports Club is on the far corner. Stop in the intersection of the next light, just past Starbucks on the left corner.

sub_instructions.description: MOVE_FORWARD through the first three lights
TURN_LEFT at the light with Shake Shack on the left hand corner and Roxy Diner on the right
MOVE_FORWARD to the end of the Parking lot on the right, just before Birdland Jazz Club

2715.full_instructions: Head straight through the first three lights and you will make a left at the light with Shake Shack on the left hand corner and Roxy Diner on the right. You will stop at the end of the Parking lot on your right, just before Birdland Jazz Club on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Go straight to the intersection
Turn left
Go straight through three lights
Stop at the fourth light in the intersection after passing Starbucks on your right

3782.full_instructions: Go straight to the intersection and turn left. Go straight through three lights and at the fourth light stop in the intersection after passing Starbucks on your right.

sub_instructions.description: Head to the corner with McDonald's on the left and make a right
Head all the way down the block and go through all the lights until you reach Wells Fargo on the corner
Head 2/3 of the way down the block and stop in front of the Renwick hotel on your right

12176.full_instructions: Head to the corner with McDonald's on the left and make a right. Head all the way down the block and go through all the lights until you reach Wells Fargo on the corner. Head 2/3 of the way down the block and stop in front of the Renwick hotel on your right.

sub_instructions.description: TURN_RIGHT at the first light
MOVE_FORWARD past two more lights
TURN_RIGHT at the next light past the small triangular park
MOVE_FORWARD and stop in the middle of the park

3578.full_instructions: Head to the first light and make a right. Pass through two more lights and you will see a small triangular park on your right. Just past that at the next light make a right. And stop in the middle of the park.
